title: lepidium montanum var. tenellum
intro: Lepidium montanum var. tenellum, also known as mountain pepperweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of mountain pepperweed include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote healing. Lepidium montanum var. tenellum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
